title: Kenneally's Funerals
tagline: A warm, dignified identity for a family funeral home in Sydney — built end to end, from concept to a live website in eight weeks.
description: A full visual identity system was developed for the Kenneally's Funerals business in Sydney. From logo and brand visual style development to a complete rollout of brochures, price guides and point-of-sale items — plus a full website. This was delivered within eight weeks, from concept to completion.

seo.title: Kenneally's Funerals — Case Study | Presto
seo.description: A warm, dignified identity for a family funeral home in Sydney — logo, brand, full collateral and website, live in eight weeks.
